label: Ingest Repository
description: Fetch repo files and store them as knowledge nodes in Graphonomous

label: Analyze Codebase
description: Run LLM analysis on ingested repo — architecture, governance patterns, conflict-resolution structures

label: Query Knowledge
description: Search the knowledge graph for governance policies, agent decisions, conflict patterns

label: Graph Health
description: Check Graphonomous stats — node counts, confidence, orphans

label: Benchmark Governance
description: Run PRISM evaluation cycles — tests deliberation, deadlock resolution, knowledge transfer

label: Deadlock Test
description: Execute the deliberation deadlock scenario — conflicting proposals, resolution, audit trail
